title: Bare Bones x Wilder Wild
description: Retextures the Wilder Wild mod to work with the Bare Bones resource pack.
body:
# Bare Bones x Wilder Wild
This pack changes the textures of the [Wilder Wild](https://modrinth.com/mod/wilder-wild) mod to fit with the [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) resource pack. 
## Resource Pack order
Be sure to have this pack placed above the 'Fabric Mods' one.![Order in which the resource packs must be placed. 'Bare Bones x Wilder Wild' must go above 'Fabric Mods'.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6444a4a29e748da2a411e8fdf1dc87800d9fb9b5.png)
